description: NaCl Born-Haber cycle: closed energy loop with sublimation, ionization, bond dissociation, electron affinity, lattice energy, and ΔHf labels.
SO4^2- Lewis structure with one form showing 2 S=O (FC=0) + 2 S-O (FC=-1); plus side panel of all 4 equivalent resonance forms.
LEFT: linear CO2, two equal opposite arrows, NET=0. RIGHT: bent H2O, two arrows at 104.5°, resultant arrow down. Makes vector cancellation visceral.
Five-panel 3D reference of all five ideal VSEPR shapes with bond angles + examples.
BF3 with curved arrows from F lone pairs into empty p-orbital on B, partial π bond labelled.
O2 MO energy-level diagram: 2s/2p AOs on sides, central MOs filled with 16 e⁻; highlight 2 unpaired in π* explaining paramagnetism.
LEFT: o-nitrophenol with dotted intramolecular H-bond to adjacent NO2. RIGHT: two p-nitrophenol molecules with intermolecular dotted bonds.
notes: Geometric explanation much clearer with a picture.
